original_statement: who came in first place on june 18, 1995?
mutated_statement: who came in both first and last place on that day in 1995?
mutation_analysis: Addition + Semantic contradiction + Temporal vagueness: Added "both" and "and last place" creating an implausible simultaneous first-and-last condition | Specific date "June 18, 1995" was de‑specified to "that day in 1995" (June 18, 1995 → that day in 1995)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可见，代理直接列出 Corey Pavin 为第一名及 Frank Nobilo、Vijay Singh、Bob Tway 为并列最后（T10），并未提及“同时既是第一又是最后”这一语义矛盾。具体表现为：忽略变异问题中“both...and last”造成的互斥矛盾，未请求澄清或指出不可能性，而是将问题按可行子集处理（即分别返回第一名与最后名次），同时对“that day in 1995”的时间模糊也未作处理。代理既未在 judge_thought 中识别矛盾，也未尝试修正或合理化矛盾，只基于可行信息继续执行并给出结果，因此归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
